Les polices de caractères suivantes ont été utilisées pour la création de ce jeu :
Nazhdak de la bibliothèque de polices ParaType (www.paratype.com)
Ministère de la Culture et des Sports
Ministère des Sciences et des Technologies
Le visiteur souhaite faire valoir son droit de recevoir des prestations, des informations ou d'autres ressources du Ministère.
Le visiteur signale une injustice ou une violation de ses droits ou intérêts, de la loi ou des normes de comportement. La partie responsable est un collectif ou une institution, et non un individu.
Le visiteur signale une injustice ou une violation de ses droits ou intérêts, de la loi ou des normes de comportement. Il identifie également le ou les responsables. (name, surname).
Le visiteur a apporté des informations ou des documents nécessaires au Ministère, ou souhaite exprimer sa gratitude.

Responsable de tout ce qui concerne les violations des directives et des lois, l'espionnage et les atteintes à l'ordre public. Il est interdit aux citoyens de frapper, de tuer, de voler ou de causer un quelconque préjudice à autrui (à l'exception des ennemis du peuple).
Chargé de promouvoir les idées lumineuses, l'image et les idéaux du Sage Leader. Traite des questions relatives à la propagande et à la défense du sentiment patriotique.

Il contrôle la vie des citoyens de la naissance à la mort. Il réglemente les crèches, les hôpitaux, les écoles et autres établissements publics. Il est responsable de la distribution des ressources sociales : bons de vacances, allocations pour soins médicaux ou formation, et fourniture de nourriture et de logement.

Responsable du travail et de la gestion de la main-d'œuvre. Encadre l'affectation des employés, veille à la protection des conditions de travail, améliore les performances et traite les cas de manquements mineurs à la discipline.
Responsable de l'organisation d'événements publics et de l'éducation culturelle, artistique, cinématographique, touristique et sportive.

Responsable du fonctionnement des centres scientifiques, des laboratoires, des universités, des usines et des manufactures. Œuvre à la mise en œuvre du message n° 7864-9 du Sage Leader (relatif à l'obtention du statut de puissance technologique de premier plan d'ici 1994).

Utilisez les instructions de travail pour tamponner correctement les formulaires d'appel des visiteurs. La procédure de traitement des formulaires se compose de trois étapes.
Étape 1. Traiter l'appel. Étape 2. Traiter la personne. Étape 3. Traiter le formulaire.
Cliquez sur « Vérifier » pour passer à l'étape suivante.
Le nombre de timbres dépend des instructions actuelles. Rappelez-vous, camarade, les instructions sont beaucoup plus importantes que le bon sens !
Si aucune instruction spécifique n'est donnée, alors toute décision que vous prenez est la bonne !
Traiter la personne qui a fait l'appel

Les clones sont l'avenir de notre pays. Les Ministères ont constamment besoin de nouvelles forces de travail. Votre tâche est de sélectionner des personnalités appropriées pour divers emplois et de les charger dans des clones. 1. Choisir une profession. 2. Utiliser les influences pour faire correspondre les traits de personnalité aux traits de l'emploi le plus précisément possible. Vous pouvez choisir de 1 à 5 influences. 3. Évaluer la compatibilité de la personnalité avec l'emploi. Utilisez la couleur des attributs comme indicateur : Green - correspondance complète. Yellow - correspondance partielle avec un écart de 5 points. Black - pas de correspondance. 4. Cliquez sur « Appliquer ». Vous serez récompensé si trois bulbes ou plus s'allument. Le ministère de l'éducation

Rapport financier, mai 1985 :
A reçu 500 000 en pots-de-vin, dont 200 000 sont allés au fonds général.
Je recommande d'organiser des exécutions motivantes pour encourager les employés à accepter plus de pots-de-vin.
1. George Hemnitz - transféré au 7ème étage (pendu à la cérémonie) Faut enquêter là-dessus !
2. Mary Sue - transférée au 16ème étage (exécution par peloton d'exécution)
3. Greg Collins - transféré au 9ème étage (accident du travail)
4. Paul Pshekovich - Transféré en cadeau au "Boucher"
Permission de ramasser du bois mort

1. Le Chœur du Collège de la Réserve du Travail : « Cher Leader, nous sommes avec vous » 2. Club des Meilleurs Amis du Leader : « Excellent Travail, Leader ! » 3. Mineurs de la VIA : « Mon Leader » 4. MilitDept : « Notre Département Vote Pour le Leader » 5. Gloire du Leader : « Héros de l'État » 6. Collectif de l'Usine Textile n° 4 : « Un Avenir Radieux dans un Immeuble de Classe B » Pas plus tard que le 5 de chaque mois : - Rapport de progrès pour le mois - Informations sur le formulaire 14D - Rapport sur le travail patriotique (formulaire 1PR) - pour Rakovich Pas plus tard que le 5, une fois par trimestre : - 2NDSO (obtenir le formulaire du coursier) - Rapport de progrès trimestriel sur le formulaire KOR4 - pour Rakovich et Ferguson Moi et [DONNÉES SUPPRIMÉES] Mes bébés. La couverture du magazine Fashion, avril 1985. Moi à vélo Moi dans l'armée En vacances Collègues: Legrand Date: 15.03.85 Qui: Marco Legrand Sujet: J'ai retiré toutes les vis de ma chaise de travail pour qu'elle s'effondre quand je m'y suis assis.
Date: 15.03.85 Qui: Marco Legrand Quoi: A soumis mes rapports de travail avant moi et a changé le nom. (Il doit être venu travailler tôt pour démonter ma chaise puis a vu les rapports sur mon bureau).
Date: 16.03.85 Qui: Marco Legrand Quoi: A rejeté toutes les demandes des visiteurs. Tout le monde a perdu ses bonus en conséquence. Moi enfant! Moi à une manifestation Moi dans le train! Caméras: Indice: le nom de votre chien Porte ouverte Sélectionnez le protocole requis. 73-24-5 A 65-71-4 B 73-40-5 C 71-30-7 D Accueil Place Poste de contrôle Pont (Étage 1) Salle d'attente (Étage 1) Hall général (Étage 1) Bureau du chef (Étage 1) Salle de destruction (Étage 12) Bureau du chef (Étage 12) Salle secrète (Étage 12) Salle de convoyage (Étage 25) Bureau du chef (Étage 25) Laboratoire (Étage 25) Salle des ministres (Étage 37) Étage 1 Étage 12 Étage 25 Étage 37 Sauvegarde automatique Sauvegarde rapide Sauvegarde manuelle Nouvelle sauvegarde Pardon ? Calmez-vous, s'il vous plaît ! Quoi ? J'ai un registre complet des nouveau-nés de notre district. À qui dois-je le remettre ? Nous avons préparé un programme pour la Fête de la Ville. À qui dois-je le transmettre ? Abigail et Morgan Kendell, mes voisins dans l'appartement communal, volent régulièrement de la nourriture dans le réfrigérateur. La nuit dernière, ils ont mangé toute ma soupe et n'ont même pas lavé la casserole ! J'espère que vous pourrez faire quelque chose pour arranger cela. Olivia Rice, dont le mari Bruno est responsable du bureau des passeports, utilise un buste de notre Chef pour maintenir sa choucroute ! Je suis ici pour vous informer qu'Adam Pluke et sa famille collectent illégalement les bons alimentaires de sa grand-mère décédée. Ma collègue, Jacqueline Tall, ferme toujours la fenêtre, et je ne peux pas travailler quand c'est aussi étouffant ! Je me suis évanouie plusieurs fois ! Punissez-la, ou au moins interdisez-lui de fermer la fenêtre ! Alors, quel est le problème ? J’ai besoin d’une attestation certifiant que je n’ai aucune condamnation. À qui dois‑je m’adresser ? Que s’est‑il passé ? Continuer. Répondre de manière évasive Et quel est le problème ? Faire connaissance Bonjour ! Que voulez‑vous ? Oui ? Au revoir Bonne chance À bientôt Demander des informations sur Hemnitz Qu’est‑ce que vous voulez dire ? Pourquoi ? Demander des informations sur les collègues Parler d’Emma Hazer Parler de Magda Rakovich Parler de mon père Non Proposer de l’aide Discussion générale Salut ! Bonne chance Parler de Hemnitz Qu’est‑il arrivé à Hemnitz ? Demander des informations sur le Ministère Refuser Aider Et qu’a t‑il dit ? Parler de Marco Legrand Appeler James Cunningham James, j’ai assisté à un “rituel” horrible. Un employé a été pendu devant tout le monde ! Comment peuvent‑ils faire ça ?! Rien d’étonnant, Evan. Les sanctions sont clairement indiquées dans la Clause 12 du Référentiel des Postes du Ministère. « Les postes importants impliquent un niveau de responsabilité accru », ou quelque chose dans ce genre. Mais c’est sauvage et barbare ! Tout le monde applaudissait ! Tu pensais que ton travail serait une promenade de santé ? C’est un nid de vipères, Evan. Et tu dois devenir le fichu roi des vipères si tu veux être promu ! Donc tu dis que je devrais comploter contre mes collègues ? Les espionner, les piéger, les faire chanter, les pousser au suicide ? Tu veux dire que tous les coups sont permis en temps de guerre ? Il n’y a vraiment aucune autre voie ? Et moi, je me soucie de la personne que je deviendrai après une telle “victoire”. Tu as toujours le choix, Evan. Bonjour, Evan. As‑tu appris quelque chose d’intéressant de la part de Hemnitz ? Je n’en ai pas eu l’occasion, James. Il a été pendu à la réunion aujourd’hui ! Comme ça, sans prévenir ! C’était horrible ! Tout le monde s’est mis à applaudir ! Comment est‑ce possible ?! C’est très suspect. Quelqu’un a t‑il entendu votre conversation ? Non, il a refusé de parler dans le Ministère ; on a discuté près de la statue du Leader. Une bonne précaution, mais totalement inutile. Il y a des oreilles partout dans le Ministère, jusqu’à la dernière brique. Je n’arrive toujours pas à y croire. Demander comment il va Mentir Demander des informations sur les pots-de-vin De quoi parlez‑vous ? Quoi ? Non, sérieusement. Qu’est‑ce que vous voulez dire ? Accepter Parler de développement personnel Proposer une aide à la productivité Vraiment ? Demander des nouvelles de sa femme Non. Dire la vérité Parler des insectes Qu’est‑ce que vous voulez dire ? Parler de la météo Proposer des substances pour améliorer l’humeur Waouh ! Je ne dirai rien ! Comment trouvez‑vous ce temps ? C’est légal ? Bien sûr ! Qui ? Payer Et alors ? Gloire au Leader ! Proposer un marché Au revoir. Terminer la conversation Demander des informations sur la Fenêtre 101 Vous savez quelque chose sur la Fenêtre 101 ? Vous voudriez un petit quelque chose pour… vous détendre et vous remonter le moral ? Non merci, ça nuirait à mon travail ! Demander les affaires de Hemnitz Demander la date Ça ne m’intéresse pas. Pourquoi ? Pas vraiment… On en reparle plus tard Demander son émission préférée Je ne vais pas jouer avec les gens. Ça ne m’intéresse pas. Avec Legrand. Je le déteste ! Ordure ! S-s-s-saleté de merde ! Peter, tu n’as aucune raison de t’inquiéter ! Tu es un type génial ! Ça suffit ! T’es mort, Redgrave ! Pas d’argent, pas de plaisir ! Vous n’auriez pas, par hasard, pris des affaires de Hemnitz ? Avez‑vous pris des effets personnels de Hemnitz ? Mais… Qu’est‑ce que je vais faire maintenant ? Pourquoi ? Merci. Être grossier Quoi ?! Demander des informations sur les collègues Demander l’argent pour Ferguson Le camarade Ferguson m’a envoyé récupérer l’argent. L’argent est transféré à la caisse comme requis, le camarade Ferguson n’a pas à s’inquiéter. Chaque centime va à l’État. Demander des informations sur Magda Rakovich Chers amis ! Gloire à notre Grand État ! Paix et prospérité à notre grande Mère Patrie collective ! Bonheur, santé et bien‑être à chacun d’entre vous ! Hourra ! Les directives du Ministère, nées du sang et de nombreuses années d’épreuves amères, rendent le bonheur de nos citoyens encore plus heureux, et leurs responsabilités encore plus responsables. Quiconque ne supporte pas la responsabilité ou viole les directives du Ministère sabote notre bonheur. Il n’y a pas de place pour eux dans le brillant avenir de notre grand pays ! Oui ? Demander des informations sur mon père Pardon ? Oui ? S’indigner Terminer la conversation Je ne devrais pas le faire attendre. Dire au revoir L’attirer dans le bureau de DeSalvo Refuser de payer Oui, bien sûr ! Appuyer Non merci. RACCROCHER Qu’est‑ce que vous voulez dire ? Changer d’avis D’accord, je vais essayer. Parlez. Demander des informations sur le travail Qui vous l’a dit ? Va au diable ! Pourquoi cette question ? Pourquoi ? Absolument ! Et les autres ? Autre chose ? Prendre l’argent Demander des informations sur les tests C’est confidentiel. Parler des clones Demander des informations sur les collègues Maria Curie Demander des informations sur cet étage Evan ! Que dois‑je faire ensuite ? Vous en êtes sûr ? Oui, mais… Utiliser votre Autorité Demander des informations sur le garde Demander des informations sur son chien Mais pourquoi ?! Demander des informations sur la mort de mon père Demander des informations sur le Cercle Intérieur Demander des informations sur la santé Demander des informations sur Carl Zero Persuader C’est terrible ! Euh… Faire du chantage Je suis Evan Redgrave. Vous essayez de me distraire de mon travail ? Que voulez‑vous ? Demander ce dont il a besoin Crache le morceau ! Vous en êtes sûr ? Merci ! I don't make arrangements with anybody! I don't have the money! So what? Aren't you in way over your head, pal? If there’s something you don't understand, just ask my boss and he’ll explain who I am and why I’m allowed to look in the drawers. Capisce? ->$7234 None of your business! You’re out of your depth here. You’re nobody! Alright, punish me! Did I ask you what I should do? I just... Shut up! ->$9132 I see you just can't help yourself! Lance Corporal Gudachek! The scanner has detected prohibited substances on your person. Please follow me this way to the firing squad... Wait! I had an arrangement with your colleague! ->$9137 I’m not paying anything! I demand a lawyer! Oh, would you like some coffee and cookies with that too? I won't say another word to you brutes! What did you call me? I'll... Redgrave! Stop. By personal order of Pete Ferguson, you are hereby detained and shall receive severe punishment... right now. What the hell? Comrade Peter Dong has reported that you have stolen from the Motherland! You took the boss's bonds. And you didn’t even think of sharing with us. If you had, you would’ve been sentenced to the mines. Now you’re sentenced to the grave. Citizen, you've been found in possession of a prohibited item, which in our country warrants the severest form of punishment! As it’s your first offence, we’ll let you off with a warning. Next time, we won’t be so generous. Request an official fine I’m willing to pay, but I want to do it by the book! Pay now Who are you? I haven't seen you before. ->$6609 Hi! My name's Evan. I'm new. New, eh? I'm Serena Marwitz. Well here's my advice, newbie: if you don't want to lose your mind - and your life - keep away from the vending machine. Buy some cold pies! I made them just three days ago. I don't change money! I'm not a bank! Cabbage pie is the best cure for sadness! Coffee and pies! Coffee and pies! ->$8378 ->$8220 ->$11444 Discuss the vending machine ->$7582 ->$6747 I recommend cranberry extract; it energizes you and keeps you loose. ->$6337 Ask about pills ->$7690 Ask about colleagues Serena, you've been working in the Ministry for quite a while. Can you help me? ->$6652 What happened to Hemnitz? ->$8065 George Hemnitz, the floor inspector. He was punished! And it serves him right! They say he was keeping explosives in his office! And that he was molesting girls from the kindergarten! And making sausages out of innocent babies!
What kind of nonsense is that?! Well, I might be getting too gruesome with the details, but mark my word, nobody here gets punished for nothing! You, like, a buddy of his or something? No, I barely knew him. Just like you. That’s no excuse for coming up with horrible stories and telling lies about him. Everyone does that. Here, have a celery meat pie - I hear it's good for the brains. Ask about Peter Dong Do you know Peter Dong? Fella in glasses, likes cabbage pies, but always says his mom makes ‘em better. Anything else? He once bought a raisin roll, but instead of raisins inside, there were bits of cockroach. These things happen. The poor fellow got so sick that the guards came running. Thought it was a terrorist attack! Turns out he's been afraid of insects since childhood. What a prima donna! I've heard that insects are a delicacy in South Borea. Do you want a bun? No thanks. ->$7002 Does Marco Legrand also buy your pies? Bah! There are two things in this building I can't stand - Legrand and the vending machine. What's the problem? With the machine? ->$9014 Legrand buys food from the machine! While I have three children and shoes that are too tight! That piece of crap deserves to be blown to smithereens! Legrand? The machine! ->$6680 Do you know Emma Hazer? Emma? She's a good girl. She's a flirt and makes herself up like a hooker, but she's a good girl. She always buys the strongest coffee. Makes sense - you can't get a good night's sleep if you're up screwing your boyfriends all night long. As far as I know, Emma works a lot, that’s why she doesn’t get enough sleep. Oh really? I'd like to see her try to get up at 4 a.m. like I do, cook pies, feed the children, listen to the political information broadcasts, and then heave this tray around all day! Well if you don't believe me, go hit on her yourself! See how that bimbo butters up her rolls right away! Are all of your metaphors food-related? Meta… What?! I can see you’re no pea-brain. Want a cheese danish? S’fresh, made just yesterday! ->$6189 ->$7937 Do you know the temperature today? Do I look like a thermometer? It's hot in summer and cold in winter. There are clouds in the sky and puddles on the ground. What other information do you want from me? I just sell pies. You ask as though you think I care. I don't sell alcohol. You need a license for that! No, not that... But maybe you might have headache pills on you? My pies don't cause headaches. I've only got laxatives. Need ‘em? I think that'll do. Well, they'll certainly make you forget about your headache! Delicious pies! Get ‘em before everyone else does! Bun lovers, get over here! Wheat buns, rye buns, soft buns, crunchy buns, sweet buns, mini-buns, jumbo buns, stuffed and glazed! Braided buns, oven-baked pies! Pasta pies are all the rage right now! Come and get ‘em! Coffee, tea, pastries, crosswords! Get yer change ready, young man! ->$9114 So all these different kinds of personal development courses have been getting popular lately... Do you… Knock it off! Yuck! I'll tell you about personal development! Daily labor is what “develops” your “person”! Look at them! Courses-shmourses… Ugh! Try working! Day and night! I'm baking away here and my life's good! Saw one shmuck by the subway the other day; was ushering folks in for “personal development”! As if a skunk like that counts as a person! By the subway? Yep, right there, from the very early morning. That scumbag stood there with his ads, getting in the way of folks tryna get to work! ->$9846 ->$10795 What do you think of our boss? Respectable man! Never blinks an eye passing by! One tough cookie! Even tougher, like that government-issue bread: two bites, and yer teeth are broken! So I just give him my share and keep a low profile. Away from the bosses, closer to the monies, you know. Ask how business is going What are you selling? How is it going? What happens to the unsold pies? The lottery! What lottery? A guaranteed-prize lottery! Buy a pie on Monday to participate! And what is the prize? Either you get full, or get to take sick leave! Depends on your luck. What are those pies made out of? Meat! The kind that oinks? Meows, actually! The less you know, the better you sleep! What's in the pies? Anything you want! I like liver pies. Out of them. Have a pasta one! Pasta pies?! Pretty nifty, huh? Came up with the recipe myself. There's always a line to take meat home from the canteen, but nobody wants the pasta leftovers. And I've got to sell something, right? How come meat pies are cheaper than potato pies? Situational marketing! ->$5706 Potatoes can't be cheaper than cardboard. It's supposed to be that way. Don't distract me from work. Planning on expanding your range? Nah, I'm good. But more products means more money. Well I can't earn all of it, can I? Besides, I'm working my ass off already. Where do you get all these fillings? Trade secret! ->$7444 At the market, after it closes. So much yummy stuff gets left behind! Got anything else but the pies? Sure! Rheumatism, three kids and a color TV. For sale, I mean. Only the pies are for sale. Talk about trading in the Ministry How do you make it past security? The Ministry is a restricted-access area! Ask for details When it was shut down to cut costs, folks started dying of starvation right at their workplaces, so the bosses had to okay selling food here. And nobody stops you? I'd love to see ‘em try! Wow, so you’re quite a big shot? Please! I started out as a janitor here. You know how it goes, though - nobody pays attention to the hired help. I've seen and heard a lot. Once the canteen got shut down, I put two and two together and went straight to the boss. We agreed on an amount fairly quick. The security chief, though, became a problem. So I had to remind him of what happened on the Day of Order a couple years ago, and he came to his senses pretty sharpish. Ever since, security just smile and wave at me. What happened? Yeah, right! Want to start smuggling pies, too? And take my job away? ->$6376 Do you have kids, Serena? Why, you wanna be a dad? No, thanks, I'm good with the one I've got. Just curious how you manage to do so much. I’m not gonna discuss my family with you. What do you care? How many kids do you have? Had three. One got drafted during the first Western campaign. The war did away with him in a month. The second one showed up again recently: shell-shocked, says he got discharged. Huge fella with baby-brain. Gotta feed him like a toddler. My third one… Oh well, I'm talking too much, gotta go. Where's your husband? Ate too many pears! ->$7476 I once brought home some pears for my youngest. Traded for ‘em at the market. And that drunken swine knocked back a bottle of moonshine and ate ‘em all! And what happened? Well, I was young… strong… He fell very ill, so to say… I remember the blood gushing out of his nose and everything… And that's how he died. Food poisoning! Terrible business! Are your parents alive? After our youngest was born, they invited us to the city to live with them. They have a huge room in social housing here. So there are five of us, but at least there's always someone to change the IV when you need to… IV? My youngest was born sick. Needs meds. And I'm no nurse. All I know is how to make pies. Is anyone helping you? Sure! The Leader's tender care and our constant victories on the battlefront! Are you kidding? Whaddaya mean?… Can't you see how I'm practically basking in care? Have you heard?! Somebody in the Ministry is selling drugs! Good for them. Thought of doing it myself, but I don't know much about them. Would you like to know more? Oh, don't you tempt me! I've just got myself off the mouthwash! But I have an idea you might like! Hm? I need to get something past security. You help me, I help you… So you’re a smart cookie, eh! Just got here, and getting busy already! You'll go far! I will if you help me. So? Getting past security is no big deal. But you see, donuts on their own aren't enough. The vending machine sells candy bars, and that ruins my business. If only it broke down beyond repair… You know what I mean? ->$7502 You bet I do! I'll see what I can arrange. Great. I've heard the only irreplaceable part of the vending machine is the reactor. Bring it to me, and I'll help you. ->$6920 I need time to think. The vending machine is out in the open… Think, but don't take too long! Serena, you're poisoning employees with drugs! Not poisoning! I just add some to their coffee to make their lives a bit better! Stop it! Why? I've never had so much money in my life! I've got a family to look after! Hi, Serena! What's new? Anything good going on today? As if! What happened? That damn vending machine is what happened! They put those metal monsters everywhere, as if they can make buns as delish as mine! Agree the buns are good Your buns are the best! I'm sure your clientele isn't going anywhere! It already has! Every night I look at my sales figures and weep! A couple more weeks like this, and I'm done! That serious, eh? If someone broke that damn thing completely, I'd shower him with gold! That's how serious it is! So, what do you say? Help auntie Serena and make a little dough? I never liked that machine either. Deal. Thank you so much, sweetie! I'll never forget it! But really do your worst, alright? I've heard the only irreplaceable part of the machine is the reactor. Bring it to me, and the money's yours. I'd love to, but I'm too busy right now. Some other time. You might come some other time, and I ain't here anymore! And that'll be on you! Go away now, I've got work to do! Criticize the buns Your buns could be used to hammer nails into concrete! Shame on you, talking about an old lady's buns like that! I work on 'em every night, I’ll have you know! Get lost now, I've got stuff to do! Hello, Serena! How's business? You tell me how business should be... What with that vending machine still vending away over there! Will you do something 'bout it, or should I find someone gutsier? I'm working on it. I'm coming up with a plan. Breaking the machine is easy; getting caught, less so... You'd better hurry, my little hunchback, before I run out of customers! Tell her about the results No need to look for anyone else. Here's your reactor. Oh you sweetheart! Thank you so much! Let me know if you need to get something past security! Here, for your trouble. Hello, Serena! Got any snacks? What for? I never snack. I meant for sale. My colleagues and I are planning a little party. Oh, sure! I’ve got Redfish sandwiches, sausage sandwiches, and cheese sandwiches. Which do you fancy? Ask about fish Redfish? That's a rarity! Well, it’s red, yes… It's herring, soaked in beet juice overnight. Ask about sausage Is the sausage fresh? I'll tell you this much: it’s only going to get fresher! Ask about cheese What kind of cheese? I don’t suppose you have any gorgonzola, by any chance? What's that? A type of blue cheese with a sublime mold - a delicacy highly valued by connoisseurs… Well, my lovely donut, not just cheese then! In my basement I've got gorgonzola potatoes, gorgonzola beetroot, gorgonzola pickles, and gorgonzola sausage! Your connoisseurs would go nuts! Enjoy the party! But if anyone starts throwing up, see if they’re pregnant first before you start pointing fingers at me! ->$9109 Pies with all sortsa fillings! It’s going great! Five for fresh pies, three for yesterday’s, one and a half for the two-day-olds! Buy all snacks Ask about bachelors What do you think people eat in restricted areas - air? They used to have a whole canteen on this floor. Tell me, Serena, are there any eligible bachelors in our Ministry? Batches of bachelors and stacks of studs. Wait, watcha need them for? Are you one of those types? No, it’s not for me. A friend of mine wants to find herself a husband. And here I thought... Well, I don’t know anyone suitable - you should look through the mail on your computer-thingy, maybe someone posted an ad. Okay, thanks, Serena. Buy a snack ->$10755 ->$10737 Does the boss not eat here? Are you nuts?! People like him only dine in restaurants. And it's better that way. For them? For me. Foodies like that are too hard to please. Did you hear about the explosion in the new wing? Of course I did, I'm not deaf! That was one hell of an explosion! They’re saying that people died... Did you know them? Of course not! Well, then quit blubbering about it! My work kills me too, but nobody’s crying over it. Why not have an artichoke pie instead? Oh, what a fool! A terrorist! So many people died... ->$15113 Serena, do you know where I can buy some other useful things? That courier, Page, has something for sale. There's also a merchant, but he might be hard to find. Do you know where I can find him? He used to work at 6 Krushvice St., and then moved past Lightenment Square. Enlightenment? No, Lightenment. The letters on the sign faded out, so they entered it into the register like that. Look for him there. How will I recognize him? You’ll know him when you see him! He wears an old-fashioned top hat to make himself more noticeable from afar. You shouldn't have any problems! I do, but I don't think I can trust you with that information, Evan. PICK UP THE PHONE DIAL NUMBER ->$12678 A call from the wife Call the pimp ->$7048 An unknown number Call the Cornflower orphanage Call Legrand's father Call from James Cunningham Call 14-061-789 Call the Archive Call the psychiatric hospital Call an ambulance Call the South Borean Embassy ->$6189 Hello, dear! It's so nice to finally hear your voice! Sorry darling, I’ve had so much work! How are things going with the new job? Everything is great! I sit in the Ministry, process visitors, shuffle papers around… The apartment is fine You'll like it! Three large rooms, a bed, a TV, a bookcase and a kitchen. No, you hang up! No, you first! No, you! Continue the conversation Hang up! ->$6265 The apartment’s not great How can I put this... Is it small? ->$7690 Does the roof leak? Are there rats and dirt everywhere? Was there a murder there? I can't say for sure, but I don’t see any blood anywhere... And furniture? There's some. A bookcase, a bed, a TV and a kitchen. So, what's wrong? I don’t know… Evan, this housing is better than what half the country lives in! Sorry, dear, but you want too much. I guess your hometown is to blame for your high standards. Maybe you're right. I just miss the two of you! ->$14744 ->$14746 ->$14748 ->$14751 Hello, who is this? Hello! Is this Evan Redgrave? Who's asking? My name is Peters. I’m the director of the Young Guard patriotic camp for children. Comrade Hazer gave us two children for upbringing, and reported that she did so on your recommendation. Did you recommend our camp? Yes that's right. Let the children grow up to be true patriots, conscientious citizens and all that... If it's hard for her to raise them... And what's the matter? According to Directive No. 95873, you are entitled to a bonus for attracting new students to the camp. Thank you for your recommendation! Hello, Evan! This is some kind of nightmare! It's a disaster! It... Emma? Is that you? What happened? What happened? The freak you introduced me to turned out to be a real monster! He left me penniless in some hole! He tricked me out of my savings and left me in some kind of shed! It’s not even a house! I don't even have the money to come back to the city! That’s very sad… Sad? You’re sad?! If it wasn’t for you, I wouldn't have lost everything! I hate you! Bas...oh ...yshsh... lgk... Emma?... Emma, I can't hear you! Hello, I'm listening. Evan? This is Emma! I'm calling you to thank you for introducing me to Henry. I finally found what I was looking for! I’m so happy for you! Is everything okay? Everything is just wonderful! Henry is very kind to me - and especially to the children. We’re just two halves of a whole! Henry and I talked it over and decided to give you a small gift for what you’ve done for us! No, Emma... We knew that you’d refuse, so we just transferred some money to your account. Thanks again, Evan! See you! Hello? Hello! This is the auto-informer of the Service for Monitoring the Activities of Ministry Employees. We would like to inform you that, in the course of an official investigation, video surveillance equipment recorded a sexual relation between... Evan Redgrave... and Ministry employee.... Emma Hazer... Hey, is there anyone there? ...Also, as a result of this intercourse, bacteriological diagnostic control has registered the infection of... Evan Redgrave... With a sexually transmitted disease. ->$10675 ... You have been issued a fine and a bill for treatment. All hail the Leader! Have you found anything out about your father? I'll tell you when I see you. I won't be coming soon, dear. But I understand that it’s not a conversation for the telephone. Just do what you have to. Everything is good with the two of us! I’m so glad to hear that! Could you say it again? We’re fine, Evan. We don't need anything, and everything's calm in Redding. Focus on your work, dear. I know this is important to you. Our girl will finally have her own room! I really want to see you… So do I. I have to go now - hang up! No, you hang up! We miss you too, honey! I have to go now, hang up! How is the investigation going? Ferguson isn’t very talkative, especially when I ask about my father. I recently learned that Ferguson is putting together some kind of party. It's not easy to get in. No one knows what goes there. A boring ministerial meeting to report all the work that’s been done? Possibly. It’s a good opportunity to get some valuable info out of Ferguson. I can't get into an event like that, so I want you to install a camera. I need to know what's going on in there. Where will I get a camera? Talk to your building manager. Or security. Install the camera in Ferguson's office and pass it on to me after the party. Ask about the building manager How do you know that he has surveillance cameras? If he doesn’t have any cameras, then they’re all already in your apartment. ->$13911 Why would security give me a camera? Because every employee is allowed a camera for observing their colleagues! Ask about getting a camera Why can’t you just give me a camera? What a stupid question, Evan! The fewer links there are between us, the lower the likelihood of you getting caught. Hello, Evan? It’s James. I’ve been looking into your colleagues. They’re an interesting bunch! I'm listening. In general, there’s nothing too unusual - but keep an eye on John Smith. What's wrong with him? We don’t have any information on him, and that's suspicious. What do you want me to do? I don't think it’s a serious matter, but if I were you I would find out everything there is to know about him. Put a request in with the Archive and let me know if you find anything, okay? I'll try! ->$14927 Evan, it is me. “Me” who? Maria Curie. Oh! It's nice to hear you! Did everything go okay? Yes, now I am safe. Thanks to you. Thank you, Evan! Don't mention it! How's your baby? I did tests. He has the Down's syndrome. Oh... I'm sorry. What are you going to do? You remember, I am geneticist? It will be okay. Well… Good luck. I sent you money. As thank you. Why? You didn't need to do that. I did need! I would be dead if I didn’t have your help. I am returning the debt! Sorry - I have to go! Hello! Evan? This is Amelia Weiss! I'd like to thank you! Yeah, Evan, it’s wonderful! I found a new job that I like and where my work is appreciated! All thanks to you! Wow, I’m so glad to hear that, Amelia! Amelia?... Hello? So, tell me about the apartment. Do you like it? Hello, James? It’s Evan Redgrave. Comrade Cunningham is not here at the moment. Call back tomorrow. ->$7050 ->$7052 ->$7054 ->$7056 ->$7058 ->$7060 ->$7062 ->$7066 ->$7068 ->$7070 ->$7072 ->$7074 ->$7080 ->$7082 ->$7084 ->$7086 Hello, is this the Cornflower orphanage? Yes, I'm listening. Tell me, could you take in two children? Are you nuts? We hardly have enough to sustain ourselves, let alone two more children! ->$14188 I think that you can make an exception in this case... You should have said so at the start… Good, the children will arrive soon. Young man! You are wasting my time! ->$10353 Would this be enough to solve the problem? Young man, do you even have that kind of money? Call later I'll call you later. Hello, is this Henry Legrand? My name is Evan Redgrave, I work with your son in the Ministry. Marco asked me to call and tell you that he’s found himself a girl and they're going to get married. Wonderful news! What's her name? Her name is Emma Hazer, she's our colleague. What a beautiful name! Could you tell her that I want to meet her? I'll write an invitation in her name! Yes, of course, I'll let her know. Goodbye! Let's start with your immediate superior, Pete Ferguson. He is a pathetic man who loves only money. You'll see for yourself soon enough. Pete knows whose son you are - everyone does - so he’ll be careful. You’ll need to gain his trust if you want to get him to slip up. Gather some information about him - squeeze it out of him, talk to colleagues, fulfill a few of his requests... If your conscience allows you to, of course… We need some dirt on that arrogant son of a bitch. But don't forget that Ferguson is just the first step - he’s not that important. Your main goal is to rise through the ranks. You’re working on the first floor at the moment. You have to make your way up higher. So either build up your Authority, ruin your boss or get rid of colleagues who pose you any competition. How do I get a promotion There’s a standard procedure. You get promoted when you earn enough Authority. Use the work phone to find out how much you need. I can’t help you much with Authority. You have to work, strengthen the Ministry's power and the Leader's glory, get colleagues out of your way or befriend them. ->$6666 Your colleagues are your competitors. Make them not be your competitors. If you find another way - go for it. Ask them to withdraw, arrange a transfer to another department or wear them down. It makes no difference to me. I’m only interested in the result - the victory! ->$6265 To hell with this Hemnitz. Keep on working! You should have said so from the beginning! Bring your children, we'll take them in. Hello, this is the Ministry of Information. What would you like to know? Request information about Gloria Melfi Hello, I would like some information about a Ministry employee called Gloria Melfi. Please wait. Gloria Melfi. 45 years old. Works at the Ministry in the appeals department. Divorced. Son Malcolm Melfi died on 17.05.1979. Since 1980 she has been under observation by Dr. Alfred Binet of the Ascent psychiatric hospital, telephone number 24-66-80. Thank you for contacting the Ministry of Information. Your Authority is insufficient. Goodbye. Request information about John Smith Hello, I would like some information about a Ministry employee called John Smith. Name - John Smith. Age - no data available. Marital status - no data available. Education - no data available. What do you mean “no data available”? How is that possible? Request information about Anthony Solerno Hello, I would like some information about Anthony Solerno. Anthony Solerno, also known as Fat Tony. Former head of the Spaghetti crime family. He is in the witness protection program. Assigned to the Ministry, to the appeals department. Handler: officer Jacob Hughes. Killed 2 years ago. No new handler has been assigned. Request information about the family of Anthony Solerno Hello, I would like some information about the family of Anthony Solerno. Anthony Solerno's family: wife - Rosabella Solerno, son - Victor Solerno. Both in the witness protection program. Residing at: 31 Leader St. Request child's personal data ->$12678 Hello, I would like to request some information about a child taken from a family in hospital. Specify their sex. Female A girl. Specify date of birth. Say that you don't know 6 February 1980 She was born on 6 February 1980. Name and personal number. Number 214782 The girl's number is 214782. Information about parents. Mother's information Her mother's name was Emilia Klarich. The type of institution in which she is held and its number. House of Misfits She was placed in House of Misfits No. 207/1. That is sufficient information. Please wait... Additional information: name - Nina Rakitich. No more information. Thank you for contacting the Ministry of Information Storage. I don't know. Call back when you have complete information. Hello, I need to talk to Dr. Alfred Binet. About what? It’s about a patient of his. She’s my colleague, and she's been acting strange lately. I’d like to discuss her illness. We don't discuss patients with third parties. I am an employee of the Ministry. My questions are none of your business. Just a second! Yes? I'm listening. Dr. Alfred Binet? My name is Evan Redgrave, I work with a certain Gloria Melfi. Are you familiar with her? Gloria Melfi? Of course! What's the matter? She’s acting a little oddly. That’s no wonder - such a difficult case! We treated her four years ago. I called the Archive - they told me that her son died in a crash. Could that be the cause of her illness? It is. I tried to tell her about what happened, but instead of accepting it, she became hysterical - her brain refused to accept the news about her son. We treated her with drugs for two years, and she had started to recover. She was soon discharged. Why are you asking about her? She constantly talks about her son as if he was alive. It’s causing us some problems. I’m very sorry to hear that. So, her condition has worsened again? Tell me: has she, by any chance, mixed you up with him? Yes, it’s happened a few times. That is very bad! What should we do? Maybe you can take her in again? I’m afraid that all the beds in the psychiatric ward are occupied for years to come. But you can try to resolve the issue yourself if you want. How? This is an experimental method, and there may be come side effects. But if you play along and pretend to be her son, it might work. You need to gain her trust and gradually pull her out of her delirium. If you do, there is a chance that she’ll accept his death and recover. Pretend to be her son? Yes, but there is one thing: if she suspects that something is wrong, her psyche won't be able to cope with it - and then anything can happen! ->$12728 She may attack the one who’s deceived her. Or kill herself, because she is tormented by a terrible feeling of guilt and loneliness. How do I avoid that? Anyone who assumes this responsibility should learn as much as possible about her son, and play their part perfectly. Sounds hard... Well, you can also wait until she finally loses it and gets sent to the House of Misfits. That could happen tomorrow, a year from now, or never - in which case she’ll live the rest of her life in her delusions. Agree to the experiment Fine, doctor, I'll try! I'll tell you what I can. My nephew studied with Melfi's son at School No. 0261. I knew her before the tragedy and I’m invested in her recovery. I repeat: before you pretend to be Gloria's son, learn as much about him as possible. Good luck! Now, my patients are waiting for me. ->$6920 I think I'll pass! I don't like this idea. You swine! I'm not chatting to you instead of working just so that you can refuse to help a good and honest woman. I told you that Gloria Melfi is seriously ill. ->$12743 I'm listening! Sorry... I have a business card here and... Well... Darling, why are you mumbling like a third-grader who’s snuck into the women's bathroom? Speak faster - time is money! I need a girl. Well, two actually. All men go through this at a certain age. Can you help me? Of course I can. You wouldn't be calling this number otherwise. Where are you, sweetheart? I’ll meet you at the entrance to the Ministry. Oh, so you're a special boy! I love working with boys like you! Ciao, see you soon! Hello, ambulance? Come quick, someone really needs help! Who doesn’t need help these days? What happened? Food poisoning I ate something bad! My stomach is killing me! And why do you eat garbage? Eat what's good for you and don't bother people with such trivial matters! Injury I was taking a bath, slipped and broke my arm! But not your leg? Then you can come here yourself! Why are you talking to me like that? I’ll file a complaint! Then you’ll also find yourself with a broken jaw! Don't distract people from their work! Heart attack I think I'm having a heart attack! You “think” you are, or you are? You see, I got a bonus today, and there was so much money that… Understood, we'll be right there! The heart is a serious matter! Fever I have a fever! You'll save on your heating, then! You have to help me! We have to help you with your fever, the Ministry of Distribution has to help us with medicine, and we all have to love the Wise Leader for his tireless care for us. See how it all goes smoothly? All the best, take care of yourself! Hello, James? It’s Evan. I'm listening. I got a promotion! I’ve been transferred to the 12th floor. That’s great news, Evan! Your father would be proud of you! But it's too early to rest on your laurels. Now everything will get even more difficult. Your task is the same: you have to find some dirt on your next boss. Get to know him, gain his trust and find something on him. Or just get your colleagues out of the way and climb up the career ladder to the next floor. The bigger the game, the more interesting the hunt. Got it, James. And be extremely careful. I heard that things aren’t so simple on this floor - judging by the sheets, they have a wild staff turnover rate. So keep an ear to the ground! I got a promotion! I’ve been transferred to the 25th floor. I never doubted you, not even for a second. Well done! A little more and you’ll find yourself at the top. Start working on your next boss. Get to know him, gain his trust and find something on him. Or just get your colleagues out of the way and climb up the career ladder to the next floor. I don’t know what’s happening in this department. Weinberg is the boss there, and he is one secretive and fanatically dedicated person. Be careful. James! I’ve been promoted to the very top! Hot damn, Evan! Finally! That’s the best news I’ve heard since... I can't even remember the last time we had such good news… Now what? What’s our next move? Sorry to disappoint you, but I don’t have a next move. We are entering terra incognita - I have no idea what awaits us on the top floor. Your father always fell silent when I asked about it… I don't mean to be rude, James, but... ARE YOU SHITTING ME?! I’ve worked all the way up to the top and you don’t know what I’m going to find there?! You’ll find answers, Evan. That I’m sure of. And this time I'm coming with you. Your clearance allows you to bring visitors with you - you’re one of the gods now. Thank you, James. Honestly, I’d feel better with you around. We won't leave a single question unanswered: Heimdall, the death of your father, all the injustices perpetrated in the name of the Leader - we’ll find the answers to every question and hold the guilty accountable! Meet me near the elevator, Evan! ->$14927 Report conversations with colleagues about Pete Ferguson I talked to my colleagues about Ferguson. And what did you find out? Nothing unusual. They didn't mention anything than could be used against him. Keep watching. We need to find a good reason to arrest him. And submit this information via the reports line. You could do with some more Authority. Talk about Albert DeSalvo It’s Redgrave. Did you find anything on DeSalvo? Report DeSalvo When I took on this job, James, I couldn't even imagine that I’d face something like this... I still feel sick… What did you see? That bastard has a whole torture palace under his office. And “palace” is an understatement! It’s a whole other world of nightmares, where he tortures and kills dozens, even hundreds of people! That son of a... But... He's smart, Evan. He’ll simply make it look as though he was dealing with enemies of the state or something like that… Hell no! I found the unthinkable, James... He... that bastard... there were children… ... ... ... ... ... I have no words… You have to stop that monster! Or I won't do a damn thing for you anymore! Do you hear me?! That's why I sent you there. You and I will make this world a little better. Let’s meet at the subway tomorrow - that freak will get what he deserves. Say that you were mistaken There’s nothing on him, James. Evan, while we stumble around in circles, those bastards keep twisting the Leader’s legacy every day, turning the Great State into a landfill! Get it together and call me when you find something important! Talk about John Smith Hello, James? Evan. It's about Smith. There is clearly something wrong with him! You noticed it too? The Archive has nothing on him but his name. All the fields are empty. No parents, no relatives, nothing. Hmm... There can only be one explanation - someone “cleaned up” his file! But why erase information about a run-of-the-mill employee? I don't know, Evan, I don't know... It seems that this John Smith isn’t as run-of-the-mill as he seems… ->$13646 He doesn't look like a tough guy and he obviously has some kind of secret... I think you can scare him a little with the information that we have. Maybe he'll crack. ->$12826 Talk about Isaac Weinberg Evan, did you find anything on Weinberg? Report Weinberg Weinberg is crazy! He plans to replace all people with his damn clones! That could be interpreted as the fantasies of a scientist who got a little carried away with his brainchild. Do you have any proof? Isn’t the fact that he’s practically planning a coup enough? I have a whole bible written by him! It describes his every step! That's better! Tomorrow morning I’ll arrest him and we’ll remove another piece from the board! Meet me at the subway. Talk about Pete Ferguson Hello, Evan. How did everything go? Did Ferguson have his party? Calling it a party is like saying that a person with a severed head has a small migraine. That bad? James, why do I imagine you rubbing your hands in glee when you say “bad”? But yes, you’re right. It was the most unruly and debauched thing I’ve ever seen. I hoped you filmed everything? I couldn't install the camera. Damn it, Evan! That was our only way to get dirt on him. Now it’s going to be hard for you to get a promotion. So either gain more Authority or take care of your competitors if you can't gain Pete's trust. Damn... I had such high hopes for that recording! Say that you have the recording I have the recording. Well done! I’ll arrest that bloodsucker in the morning! I'll meet you at the subway - you’re coming with me. I think you deserve to witness it. Great job, Evan! Keep the recording to yourself I didn't manage to pick up the film. Someone probably found the camera and turned it off. Say goodbye Excuse me, my name is Evan Redgrave, Nathan Kehler gave me your number. The old rascal is still alive? Funny. But a name alone doesn't tell me anything. He told me that you’re capable of decisive action. Maybe. Sorry, how can I address you? Call me George Danton. George, I need your help with a delicate matter. There’s a chemical plant in the suburbs. It’s poisoning the whole district. And what does that have to do with me? I want you to help me shut down the factory. Do you work for their competitors? No, I just want to help people! We have to organize an anti-pollution strike at the factory! An anti-pollution strike? What was your... Evan! You know absolutely nothing about the revolutionary struggle against the capitalists. They must be destroyed! No! I don't want there to be any casualties! I hear you. We’ll take on your case. We will prove that The New Tomorrow is capable of real action! I have a guy with all the information about this situation. Can I tell him to contact you? Deal. All hail the Lead-... Damn.. Revolution or Death! Request information about Carl Stein James, it’s Evan! I'm listening. I found Albert DeSalvo's secret shelter! He’s built a secret room under his office where he tortures and kills people! A secret room? Are you sure? Absolutely! Can we arrest him now? Not so fast, Evan. I'm sure that he'll find a plausible explanation for everything. He’ll say that he’s been torturing enemies of the state - and, naturally, they’ll believe him. So what do I do? We need something more than torture and murder. More? Like what? I don't know. You need to find something in that room that we can use to nail him to the wall. Fine, James, I'll try. Although I can’t imagine anything worse. Goodbye. Embassy of South Borea. I'm listening. I have information about a citizen of your country - Maria Curie. Who's speaking? It doesn't matter! It does! Maria Curie disappeared a few months ago in unclear circumstances while attending a scientific conference. Consider me a well-wisher. Maria was kidnapped by the special services of our state and is being forced to work on our projects. Can you tell me where she's being held? She’s at the Ministry during the day, and at night she’s taken to Residential Block No. 4. She has a translator. And... She’s pregnant… And what do you want from us? Just help her get out! She won't last long here. Thank you for contacting us. We will make every effort to free her! I want to request information about Carl Stein. Fulfilling request… Carl Stein. Personal file classified. The dossier was destroyed by order of the Ministry of Cutting-Edge Scientific Developments. Last place of work - the manager of a Class D apartment building at 6 Krushvice St. Thank you. That's something to go on! Say that you don't have the recording I don't have the recording with me... Evan, without that recording from the party, we don’t have anything on him. Call me when you have that tape. I need to go to work. It's too early to go home. What do you want? Marco Legrand sent me. Marco sent me. You have something for me. Here's your “something”. Be careful, man, security aren’t fans of this stuff. ->$6337 Bye! Hi, mister! ->$6609 Where are your parents, little girl? What's your name? Are you lost? No. My mom works in the Ministry, and I wait for her here after school. When she finishes her work, we'll go home. My name is Anka, what's yours? I'm Evan! Hi, sir! Ask why she's not going home Why don't you go home? It's boring! The radio keeps saying “blah-blah-blah, war this, war that”… So I figured I’d train beetles to keep myself busy! I found them in the bushes! A whole bunch! Though mom won't let me bring them inside. She says the building manager will get mad. Talk about talking to strangers Didn’t your mom tell you to not talk to strangers? Yeah. So how come you're talking to me? Don't you remember? I told you, my name is Anka. So now we're not strangers. ->$7892 I see you've got a whole bug circus! Yes! They're trained! They can do anything! I haven’t taught them to do anything yet, though… Ask to collect the beetles I want cool bugs like that too! Can you get a couple for me and put them in a bag? Sure! And what will you give me in return? I'll bring you a piece of candy later. Candy makes my teeth hurt! I want Ask what she needs that much for Whoa! What on Earth do you need that much money for? Mom had a fight with our building manager recently. He said we need to pay up. And then mom cried… Pay for beetles Here's the money. Here's your bugs! Train them well, though, or they might escape! You, sir… All grown up, but can't count your own money… ->$6189 ->$6337 Excuse me… ->$11897 You work for the Ministry, right? That's right. How did you know? Nothing special, I’m just professionally observant. You work with Marco Legrand, right? Give him this envelope, it's very important. ->$7502 Sure, I'd be happy to help! There’s nothing prohibited in there, right? No, no, of course not! Just a friendly note! Nothing prohibited! ->$6920 Sorry, but we have very strict guidelines. You can't bring outside materials into the Ministry. Rules are rules, I get it. But it was worth a try. Sorry! ->$15172 ->$15170 ->$15176 Have the guidelines changed or something? Have you decided to help me after all? I decided that bureaucracy shouldn't get between people. Give me your envelope, I'll take it to Legrand. I agree completely! Thank you so much! Alas, there’s no escaping bureaucracy… ->$15174 Sorry, but the rules are the same for everyone. Too bad. ->$9710 What can I do for you? You talked to me! Thank you! The thing is, I can't get anyone to help me! My line, over there, isn't moving at all! I've been waiting for a week now, and haven't moved an inch! And how can I help? Just keep waiting. Everyone else does! But look at it, really! That window is closed! I can't just keep standing here! Can you check on the employee for that window? What if something’s happened to them and I should go stand in a different line? ->$7502 OK, what window number is it? Number 101. I'll see what I can do. ->$6920 Sorry, but I'm really busy here. Try asking someone else. We still haven’t moved... Can you please check? Okay, but I can't promise anything. In any case, thank you. If it starts moving, it'll be the best day of my life! I'm still too busy. Of course! You work for the Ministry, and we're just simple folk… So? Are they going to start taking applications? Still working on it, I’ll keep you posted. I have good news and bad news. Which do you want first? Bad! The employee from that window died from exhaustion at his desk a week ago. That's awful! What's the good news? You’re now free to go stand in a different line. You know what… Think I'll just go home. I wanted to get the reward for turning in banned books, but I doubt it'll cover my expenses. You can take the book, if you want; I'm not carrying it back home! Agree Thanks. I know what to do with it. Keep it, I want nothing to do with dangerous literature! What a great day! ->$7934 ->$7976 ->$7937 ->$8013 Lousy as always. ->$6337 Would you like to… relax and cheer yourself up a bit? What do you have in mind? Nothing special… Here's what we'll do. On the bridge by the exit in the lobby, there’s a flower pot. There’s a fence by the pot; put your “nothing special” behind the stone sphere, and in return I'll put money- ->$15154 ->$12384 ->$11075 ->$15158 ->$11130 ->$15162 ->$8534 ->$12563 ->$15166 ->$15168 ->$15170 ->$15172 ->$15174 ->$15176 ->$9708 ->$7976 ->$7937 How do you like this weather? I have no clue. We've been working nonstop for the past few days. there’s no windows in here, either. ->$6337 Stupid work! I get so tired, I feel like I’ve been shoveling coal all day long! Tell me about it! And it gets worse every quarter. I even started taking some acorn extract - tastes awful, but it’s supposed to help your cognitive abilities. My doctor prescribed me antidepressants, but you can’t even get any these days! Even bandages are rationed! I heard about a new medicine… A secret one, you know. So, it does something to your brain, and fires you up like some kind of genius! No side effects, no issues with other medicines, just pure stimulation! I've heard they're already testing it on volunteers. I wish I was one of them! How do you know all that, if it's such a secret? My first wife's cousin worked at the plant where they made the pills. She took one, and did her month’s workload in half a day! That's why they won't let everyone have them. Don’t want to pay everyone bonuses. Wow! Can she get any more? I'd buy them - I’ve got a deadline coming up and I’m swamped! I hope you understand it's not that easy and… not exactly safe? I don’t really fancy the idea of sticking my neck out for all of you… I'll never tell a soul! Me neither! I swear on the Great Leader himself! Why not swear on the Criminal Code, idiot? You're an idiot! Stop shouting - security’s gonna hear! Shut up and get your money ready if you want the pills. There’s a fence with a hole in it by the vending machine. I'll leave the stuff there; you put the money in the same spot. Understood? Yes. One pill costs ->$8003 What did you expect?! I shouldn’t have to tell you that if the police find out, we’re all going to prison. I'm not going to cover for you. ->$8006 I swear on… I’ve heard that already. See you. ->$15154 ->$12384 ->$11075 ->$15158 ->$11130 ->$15162 ->$8534 ->$12563 ->$15166 ->$15168 ->$15170 ->$15172 ->$15174 ->$15176 Hi! ->$7976 ->$7937 ->$8013 Great weather! I love rain. ->$6337 How about getting some relaxation? ->$7476 I heard that one could get some pills here… Just vitamins… But very effective ones! Interested? ->$8020 Please! Alright, alright… That'll be I'll leave the pill in the bust of the Leader at the office exit. Put the money there. We’re not going to have any issues, right? Right. ->$15154 ->$12384 ->$11075 ->$15158 ->$11130 ->$15162 ->$8534 ->$12563 ->$15166 ->$15168 ->$15170 ->$15172 ->$15174 ->$15176 Hi! Do you work a lot? Do you get tired? Is your career stalling? Do you keep trying, but nothing… Excuse me, but who are you? A personal motivation coach! With me, you can be successful! You can reach your goals! You can move up the career la- Thanks, not interested. That's because of your low self-esteem! Come to my self-satisfaction training to learn how to become interested in yourself again! Self-satisfaction, you said? See, you're already interested! My company, “Wings”, offers personal development training - including self-satisfaction training. You want to like yourself, don't you? I already do! That’s great! You're so sure of yourself! Please take our leaflets and spread the word at work! Let everyone be happy! Okay. Hear the word of the Leader! Open up your soul to him! Join us, The Word of the Leader, to get answers to all your questions! All of them? The Leader's wisdom knows no limits! You don't have to think or choose anymore; the Leader has all the answers! Just come to us and find out! What question is bothering you? Who killed my father? That's a great question! And, of course, the Great leader has an answer for you. Open the book of quotations to the “Murders” section, to the chapter on “Murder of Relatives”. Let's read it aloud, “Losing a loved one is a misfortune; losing faith in our party is a tragedy”. And what does that mean? It means you're asking the wrong questions! Think of how to help the Leader! Join us! Help the Leader make the world better! Why did my colleague, George Hemnitz, get punished? Great question! Punishment is a gift from the Leader to point us towards the right path! There is a whole chapter on punishments in the Leader's book of quotations, and it explains everything! Take this, for example, “Public hanging is a great honor, for the punished one gives hope for tomorrow to the living!”. I doubt Hemnitz was excited about being honored that much. Not everyone can accept the Leader's wisdom. Come, and we'll teach you to see it everywhere! Where can I get some money? Great question! Everyone keeps asking, and only the Leader has the answer! What is the answer?! See the Leader's book of quotations, page 59, third paragraph down: “Don't ask me where to get money!”. Brilliant, isn't it? What's the point of living? That's a terrific question! Tell me honestly, have you already tried to find the answer elsewhere? Books, films, plays? A philosopher friend, perhaps? Philosophers are enemies of people! I don't have friends like that! Just checking. Bear with me, I’m just doing my job. So, the only place to find the answer is in the Leader's writings. Want to know more? ->$8047 Come to our meetings! The Word of the Leader will answer all of your questions! I'll think about it… ->$6337 I'll see. Perhaps, I'll refer someone else to you. ->$12033 ->$6609 I'm Evan Redgrave. I work here. Me too. I take care of the plants. And your name is…? Is always being called out when the plants get dry. Anything else you want? Ask what he's doing What are you doing? I don't think that's what the plants need! The plants are infested with damn bugs, and if I don't gather ‘em all up now, in a couple of days there'll be nothing but bare branches left - and we're entered into a best houseplant contest! I've already filled two bags and they just keep coming! ->$6652 ->$6760 ->$8065 The guy that was hanged at the meeting. You know. Hanged at the meeting. There are meetings. People get rewarded and punished there. Hemnitz got punished. It happens. ->$7892 What do you do with the bugs you gather up? Put ‘em in bags. Burn the nasty ones, feed the rest to the birds. Ask for bugs Can I get some bugs from you? Are you nuts? No, I mean it! I like feeding birds, too. Well, yeah… birds are pretty. But I ain’t doing your work for you! Here's a bag, go and get some yourself. ->$6189 ->$6337 ->$12959 What do you want? ->$10719 Tell me about the stimulants. Why talk about them? It’s better to buy them! ->$10723 I want to buy them. Half of the proceeds from each purchase goes to Helmer's landscaping fund. Buy a pill - save a bush! ->$10727 Ask who he works for Who gives you the stimulants? I don’t rat on my own people! Ferguson is gone, but our business is still alive. There’s still lots of work to do! Since Legrand got caught, Ferguson has taken control of everything. Now I sell stimulants part-time, and help improve the effectiveness of the Ministry's staff. I checked out the booth the customer was referring to, and saw the reason straight away: a dead employee isn’t much help to anyone! Looks like he had a heart attack, but no one noticed… An inconspicuous life, an inconspicuous death… I should tell security. Let them deal with it. Hemnitz was hanged right in front of me! I have to ask someone what's going on here. Magda Rakovich is bound to know something! I need a key! If only I could pick locks... I must find a key. What a suspicious person… What should I do with the envelope? Legrand will skin me alive if I open it. But I'm not his courier, either... Especially if I’m being used and kept in the dark… Open the envelope I can't take any risks. I should see what's inside. <i>Marco, we have a problem! Our channel’s been cut off - the idiot that got the stuff into the Ministry got caught. Think of a way to get the pills through security. Think fast.</i> Don't open the envelope No, I won't read other people's mail. The PCBM-42 provisions machine welcomes you. Leave feedback about the machine You chose “Leave Feedback”. Select feedback type. Leave positive feedback You chose “Leave Positive Feedback”. Thank you for your feedback. The Ministry of Scientific Research loves you. Complain about the machine Are you sure you want to leave negative feedback? ->$6277 ->$12050 But I chose negative feedback! No, you didn't. Yes, I did. I chose “Leave Negative Feedback”. You chose positive feedback. The machine cannot be wrong. I am the machine. Thank you for your feedback. The Ministry of Scientific Research loves you. ->$6189 ->$6705 Thank you for your trust. Examine the machine You notice the cover of a power unit on the machine's casing. It’s fastened with four screws. You will need a screwdriver to remove the cover. Take apart Buy snacks for Ferguson ->$8183 Finish checking Out of order. Are you absolutely sure you want to leave negative feedback? No. You didn't. You successfully remove the power unit's cover. Not enough money. “Work harder and you will be rewarded for your effort.” The Wise Leader’s Essays: The Complete Collection, volume 38, page 12. Comrade Ferguson is on a business trip. He won't be here for a while. Didn’t they teach you to knock? Who do you think you are - waltzing into Comrade Ferguson’s office without knocking? Don't break into the boss’s office without knocking! Only the Great Leader can enter without knocking, and you don't look like him at all, Redgrave! My instructions oblige me to remind you that it is prohibited to enter the manager’s office without prior notice by knocking on the door! ->$5706 Err... ->$9742 ->$9744 ->$9746 It’s a pity my vacation isn’t coming up soon. Or ever... Ahem… ->$9749 ->$9751 ->$9561 What do you want? To report a dead employee There's a body in booth 101! ->$6661 “Why” what? Why’s there a body or why’s it in 101? Why don't I know about it? I have no idea! But now you know! I'll handle it. Dismissed. Thank you for you service! That's it? Yup. ->$8220 I have a question for you. Say, what’s the penalty for taking prohibited items into the building? It is impossible to take prohibited items into the building. But still... Suppose I asked you to smuggle something in, how much would you fine me? A fine for bribing an official, a fine for violating the rules, plus my partner's cut. How big is his cut? Ask him yourself. He hasn't been at work for several days. And that doesn't bother you? Working round the clock isn’t good. Find out what happened to him. Then we can discuss your business. Find out the partner's address I'll stop by his place and check on him. Merzice, number 10. That's the address. I'll find out what’s going on and come back. ->$11417 If you’re satisfied, then I've got nothing to worry about! Ask him why he’s so angry Has something upset you? You look angry. I need a partner. Didn't you have a partner? What's the problem? I don’t have a partner. Then ask for a partner! I need MY partner. Where is he? At home. I need to get to him at home. But I can't go. This makes me angry. Ask someone! You're an influential man - no one will turn you down! Will you go? ->$7502 Well I can’t really say no. I'll try to find him. I'm afraid I'm busy right now. Maybe later? Tell him about his partner Your partner... er … has some complaints about how you treat him. You should probably be softer with him. Call him! I see. Will you help me get something forbidden into the Ministry? We'll arrange a drill. I’ll do it. Let them try and catch me. ->$8266 ->$8258 Evan Redgrave?! Please report for routine medical testing. All employees must provide samples upon request. Get surveillance cameras How can I get a surveillance camera? Write a request to the security department. They will give you one. Persuade him to give you a camera. Isn't an oral request enough? Enough for responsible ministry employees. Only use it for work-related business. I will! ->$7690 ->$6189 Talk about people exiting the Ministry. Comrade policeman, can I ask you a question? Go ahead. Is there a record of employees leaving the Ministry? There is. Can I see it? ->$10972 I’m not sure you understand... This is very important. Show me the log of people leaving the Ministry. Fine, here's the log. Looks like he didn't leave the Ministry. ->$10334 Yes, thank you. Stand back, citizen. Or else you’ll be issued a fine and some bodily harm. ->$10989 ->$10984 ->$10992 ->$10994 ->$10996 Do you mind if I stand here a little? When you sit alone all day, you just want to chat with someone! ->$10999 Talk about Lost and Found Are you in charge of the Lost and Found? Yes. And where do the things in the box come from? Do people bring them? Mostly the pathologist. How responsible of him. He has his orders. If someone dies with secret documents - he brings them here. ->$6365 What does your job involve? I come in on time. Issue fines. Go home. ->$11361 I also break bones. Sounds like the dream job! ->$7937 How do you like the weather this week? Wet. Nice weather for ducks, eh! Let it rain. ->$6376 ->$11495 And there never was? Was. ->$14650 And now - no. Talk about diet You’re on duty all day... You mustn’t have a lot of time to eat? Food is a problem. And how do you solve it? I don't eat. At all? Sometimes I fine Marwitz for pies. Or confiscate them. Aren't you afraid of getting food poisoning? I'm not afraid of anything. I saw shit when I was at the Front. I ate shit. I was shit. I'm safe now. Talk about his physical shape How do you manage to stay in such great physical shape? Regular exercise with a baton in the open air. Honestly, I just asked for no reason... I don't care... This is where we keep employees' lost and found stuff. Why are you searching this place? Say you're here for Hemnitz’s things Magda Rakovich sent me. I came to get Hemnitz’s belongings. Take what's left. Left? Has someone already been here? A colleague. Took some box and left. What colleague? None of my business. ->$10158 ->$15293 ->$6747 Today's hero is Peter Dong! This comrade mistakenly believes that his colleages in the Ministry have any interest in his personal life! You think you're a great poet? You have zero talent. There are cockroaches in this Ministry with more artistic ability! Every employee must think only about there work. Men are forbidden to think about women, and women are forbidden to think about men! For the crime of mass-mailing you are sentenced to a reprimand in your personal file, a quintuple fine, and community service in the metro - where you are to scrub away graffiti. All hail the Leader! Now back to your workplaces, everyone! I was passing by and smelled some burnt rubber. I thought a cable had caught fire, but everything seems to be fine. The courier put my documents on someone else's desk. He does that all the time. I think I saw a mouse. That's nonsense! I don't believe you! You must be joking! Not funny. Fine, I need to get back to work. No problem. If you say so, my friend, it must be true. ->$15092 ->$15304 ->$15306 ->$15308 ->$15310 ->$15312 ->$15314 ->$15316 ->$15081 Hello! My name is Evan. I'm new here. Nicholas Page, the courier. ->$6628 ->$8357 ->$8359 Maybe. What exactly do you want to know? Do you know where I can find window 101? Go left, then after about 50 meters take a look down the corridor on the right. You should be able to find it from there. ->$7585 ->$8365 ->$8367 ->$15079 ->$8378 ->$6337 ->$6365 Tell me about your work as a courier. It’s a shitty job, if you ask me. I've got access to other floors, but that’s of no use. ->$6189 ->$9117 ->$7690 ->$15083 ->$15085 ->$9109 Ask about counterfeit money Comrade Ferguson told me that you'll give me a bundle of counterfeit money. Take this pen and sign the receipt form. OK. And the warehouse bill. ->$10477 And the accident prevention training log. But there was no training! You’re not getting anything until you sign it. ->$10482 And give the pen back. Give him the microchip and tell him the code to the freight in the cart Nicholas, I have something for you… Of course, Comrade Redgrave! Where do you need it delivered? I think this is for you personally. I'm listening. “The sky is always blue over the statue of the Leader...” What statue… Ah! Oh! Keep your voice down, Nicholas! Sorry... I get it! One of them would have a birthmark right here, but we could always have it removed. Talk about yourself honestly I'm afraid of beetles, open spaces, and the idea of everyone laughing at me. Hm... Valuable information! Are you always so frank or am I just lucky? Mom always told me to speak only the truth. How sweet! Do you still live with your mother? Do you have a family, children? Tell her you love children I adore children. Although I haven't found the right person to have them with yet... Really? What an incredible coincidence! Children are so cute, so wonderful! But you’re right, it’s very difficult to find the right person... Tell her you don't like children I hate children. They scream constantly, always make a mess and don't know how to behave! Save your compliments for our date! Let me know when you arrange everything. And now I have to go! See you! You'll see me on our date! Haha… Bye, Peter! But I… Leave me alone and don't come near me again! ->$6088 ->$9014 ->$9016 The shame! Oh... My life is over... Comfort ->$9021 I'm sure everything will be fine. I'll help. Why sign him up then? Oh, don’t ask me! This day has been so hectic, my head is spinning! Gloria, hi! You mention your son quite a lot... Could you tell me more about him? I'm very interested. It made me so happy! ->$9256 Ask about favorite book Does he like reading? What’s his favorite book? Not sure what it is now, some reference book or other.
